findings.description: Nested <main> landmark elements - ensure the document has at most one main landmark at top level
findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The word 'Everyone' in the asterisked note loses its bold formatting in the HTML, which slightly reduces its visual emphasis compared to the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'chat with **Everyone**' (bold). HTML: 'chat with Everyone' (no bold/strong tag).

findings.description: There are two nested <main> elements in the HTML, which is structurally unusual but does not affect content fidelity or heading hierarchy.
